title: Before Thee, God Who Knowest All

verses.text: Before thee, God, who knowest all, with grief and shame I prostrate fall. I see my sins against thee, Lord, the sins of thought, of deed, and word. They press me sore; I cry to thee: O God, be merciful to me!
O Lord, my God, to thee I pray: O cast me not in wrath away! Let thy good Spirit ne'er depart, but let him draw to thee my heart, that truly penitent I be: O God, be merciful to me!
O Jesus, let thy precious blood be to my soul a cleansing flood. Turn not, O Lord, thy guest away, but grant that justified I may go to my house at peace with thee: O God, be merciful to me!
